title: Burkhard Balz: Cash and the digital euro – complementary forms of public money
body:
Opening statement by Mr Burkhard Balz, Member of the Executive Board of the Deutsche Bundesbank, at the ESTA Conference and Exhibition 2026, Berlin, 8 June 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260609d.htm

title: Denis Beau: Strengthening the security of European payments
body:
Keynote speech by Mr Denis Beau, First Deputy Governor of the Bank of France, at the conference "Digital fraud: detect, respond and prevent", hosted by the Banco de Portugal, Lisbon, 26 May 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260608a.htm

title: Steven Maijoor: Fintech, supervision and smooth sailing
body:
Welcome address by Mr Steven Maijoor, Executive Board Member and Chair of Supervision of De Nederlandsche Bank, at De Nederlandsche Bank's Money20/20 pre-event, Amsterdam, 1 June 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260604d.htm
